title: Iframe - custom, select only a few columns to embed
excerpt: Hiya, I am embedding an iframe into our website but only want to use certain columns from the board - is this possible?

posts.author: Vic (Vicki Culshaw)
posts.cookedHtml: Hiya, I am embedding an iframe into our website but only want to use certain columns from the board - is this possible?

posts.author: deceiver08 (Devin Doring)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Vic. Not sure if you are still working on this, but yes you can. You need to first create a view of your board with the columns you want displayed. Then you can share that view, and Monday will even generate the iframe code for you when you share. See this help doc to create a view and this one to share.
